_publications._publicationTitle: Selective nitration of Hsp90 acts as a metabolic switch promoting tumor cell proliferation.

_contextSnippet: Doubling the levels of NO2 Hsp90 induced a statistically significant increase in cell growth 24 h post-delivery...significantly increased cell numbers at 12 and 24 h
details: Doubling endogenous nitrated Hsp90 levels induced statistically significant increase in cell growth 24h post-delivery, with ~15-20% increase in proliferation at 12 and 24h
